title: Delhi HC rejects PIL against different dress codes for judicial and technical members of GST Appellate Tribunal
description: The Delhi High Court on Wednesday refused to entertain a public interest petition (PIL) petition filed by a lawyer flagging difference in dress codes for judicial and technical members in the Goods and Services Tax Appellate Tribunal (GSTAT) [Garima Singh & Ors vs Union of India & Anr.]The Division Bench of Chief Justice Devendra Kumar Upadhyaya and Justice Tejas Karia stated that such matters cannot be decided by courts.“How is this a PIL? These issues are not justiciable," the Court sa
